subcodes.first_line: O Amin! Upon thee be the peace of God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, the Wronged One speaketh not as did the Tree of Sinai when it gave utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین علیک سلام الله رب العالمین ان المظلوم لیس الشجر بما نطقت سدره الطور
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Muhammad; Islam, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @station of the Manifestation of God, @words vs deeds
